about_me_section_text1: Hi. I'm Kevin! Programming is more than just a hobby for me – it's my passion. With every project, my curiosity grows to implement new ideas and find creative solutions to complex challenges.
about_me_section_text2: I live in Plauen in the Vogtland region and work flexibly – remotely or as part of a team. Open communication is particularly important to me, because good ideas rarely arise in isolation.
about_me_section_text3: Discovering new technologies and continuously improving my skills motivates me. I am curious, enjoy experimenting, and am always ready to develop myself further.
about_me_section_text4: I approach challenges in a structured and solution-oriented manner. First, I try to understand the problem precisely and break it down into smaller, manageable steps. Then, I develop various approaches and select the most efficient or sensible solution.
technologies_text1: I am a passionate front-end developer with a focus on modern web technologies and user-centered design. The constant evolution of the web motivates me to learn new technologies and create intuitive, engaging digital experiences.
technologies_text3: New technologies, new ideas, new paths – I love thinking outside the box and delving into unfamiliar areas.
featured_projects_text1: Explore a selection of my work here - Interact with projects to see my skills in action.
memory_project_about_text1: Reveal cards, find pairs, challenge your brain – a memory experience as an app. With smooth performance and intuitive controls, each round becomes a mini-challenge for concentration and memory.
el-pollo-loco_project_about_text1: Jump, run and throw game based on object-oriented approach. Help Pepe tofind coins and tabasco salsa to fight against the crazy hen.
join_project_about_text1: Task manager inspired by the Kanban System. Create and organize tasks usingdrag and drop functions, assign users and categories.
colleagues: What my colleagues say about me

comments.text: The collaboration with Kevin was a key factor in the success of the Join project. He consistently worked efficiently and with a focus on solutions, contributed his own ideas, and was able to present them convincingly. At the same time, he was open to suggestions from the team and actively contributed to constructive collaboration.
comments.author: Dominik Trödle - Team Partner Join

comments.text: Kevin was a valuable part of our team. His open manner, his commitment, and his technical skills made the collaboration particularly pleasant and successful.
comments.author: Nico Reckert - Team Partner Join

comments.text: Mr. Breiter impresses with his efficient work style, initiative and the ability to quickly familiarize himself with new topics.
comments.author: Mr. Lingner - Supervisor at Gealan

contact_text1: The projects showcased in my portfolio are practically oriented and reflect my experience with modern frontend technologies like Angular. I welcome exciting opportunities to apply my knowledge to real-world projects and further develop my skills as a developer. Please feel free to contact me if you are looking for a motivated junior frontend developer for your team.

acceptance_text: By accessing and using Portfolio (Product), you acknowledge and agree to the following terms and conditions, and any policies, guidelines, or amendments thereto that may be presented to you from time to time. We, the listed students, may update or change the terms and conditions from time to time without notice.
ownsership: Scope and ownership of the product
ownsership-text1: Portfolio has been developed as part of a student group project in a web development bootcamp at the Developer Akademie GmbH. It has an educational purpose and is not intended for extensive personal & business usage. As such, we cannot guarantee consistent availability, reliability, accuracy, or any other aspect of quality regarding this Product
ownsership-text2: The design of Portfolio is owned by the Developer Akademie GmbH. Unauthorized use, reproduction, modification, distribution, or replication of the design is strictly prohibited.
Proprietary rights_text1: Aside from the design owned by Developer Akademie GmbH, we, the listed students, retain all proprietary rights in Portfolio, including any associated copyrighted material, trademarks, and other proprietary information.
product_text: Portfolio is intended to be used for lawful purposes only, in accordance with all applicable laws and regulations. Any use of Portfolio for illegal activities, or to harass, harm, threaten, or intimidate another person, is strictly prohibited. You are solely responsible for your interactions with other users of Portfolio.
disclamer: Disclaimer of warranties and limitation of liability
disclamer_text: Portfolio is provided 'as is' without warranty of any kind, whether express or implied, including but not limited to the implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement. In no event will we, the listed students, or the Developer Akademie, be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential or exemplary damages, including but not limited to, damages for loss of profits, goodwill, use, data, or other intangible losses, even if we have been advised of the possibility of such damages, arising out of or in connection with the use or performance of Portfolio.
Indemnity_text: You agree to indemnify, defend and hold harmless us, the listed students, the Developer Akademie, and our affiliates, partners, officers, directors, agents, and employees, from and against any claim, demand, loss, damage, cost, or liability (including reasonable legal fees) arising out of or relating to your use of Portfolio and/or your breach of this Legal Notice.
questions: For any questions or notices, please contact us at [Contact Email]
Responsible_person_p1: The controller within the meaning of data protection laws, in particular the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), is:
Your_data_subject_rights_p1: You can exercise the following rights at any time using the contact details provided, in accordance with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR):
Your_data_subject_rights_li1: Information about your data stored with us and its processing (Art. 15 GDPR),
Your_data_subject_rights_li2: Correction of inaccurate personal data (Art. 16 GDPR),
Your_data_subject_rights_li3: Deletion of your data stored with us (Art. 17 GDPR),
Your_data_subject_rights_li4: Restriction of data processing if we are not yet allowed to delete your data due to legal obligations (Art. 18 GDPR),
Your_data_subject_rights_li5: Right to object to the processing of your data by us (Art. 21 GDPR) and
Your_data_subject_rights_li6: Data portability, provided you have consented to the data processing or have entered into a contract with us (Art. 20 GDPR).
Your_data_subject_rights_p2: If you have given us your consent, you can withdraw it at any time with effect for the future. You can lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority at any time, e.g., with the competent supervisory authority of the federal state where you reside or with the authority responsible for us as the data controller. A list of supervisory authorities (for the non-public sector) with addresses can be found at:
Processing_activities_h3: Collection of general information when visiting our website
Processing_activities_p1: When you access our website, i.e., if you do not register or otherwise submit information, general information is automatically collected. This information (server log files) includes, for example, the type of web browser, the operating system used, the domain name of your internet service provider, your IP address, and similar data.
Processing_activities_p2: They are processed in particular for the following purposes:
Processing_activities_li1: Ensuring a smooth connection to the website
Processing_activities_li2: Ensuring smooth use of the website
Processing_activities_li3: Ensuring and evaluating system security and stability, especially for the detection of misuse.
Processing_activities_li4: Ensuring a technically error-free presentation and optimization of the website
Processing_activities_p3: We do not use your data to draw conclusions about you personally. However, we reserve the right to subsequently review the server log files should there be concrete indications of unlawful use.
Processing_activities_p4: The processing is carried out in accordance with Art. 6 para. 1 lit. f GDPR on the basis of our legitimate interest in improving the stability and functionality of our website as well as ensuring system security and misuse detection.
Processing_activities_p5: Recipients of the data may include technical service providers who act as data processors for the operation and maintenance of our website.
Processing_activities_p6: Data is stored in server log files in a form that allows for the identification of the data subjects for a maximum of 90 months, unless a security-related event occurs (e.g., a DDoS attack). In the event of such an event, server log files are stored until the security-related event has been resolved and fully investigated.
Processing_activities_p7: Providing the aforementioned personal data is neither legally nor contractually required. However, without the IP address, the service and functionality of our website cannot be guaranteed. Furthermore, individual services may be unavailable or restricted.
Processing_activities_p8: Please read the information about your right to object under Article 21 GDPR below.
Processing_activities_p10: Our website includes a contact form that can be used to contact us electronically. If a user chooses to use this form, the data entered will be transmitted to us and stored. You can also contact us via the provided email addresses. In this case, the user's personal data transmitted with the email will be stored. This includes the date and time of email transmission, email address, IP address, and information about the servers involved in the email communication. Regardless of the chosen communication method, we collect the content of your inquiry. Your data will be stored for the purpose of individual communication with you.
Processing_activities_p11: The processing of your data is based on a legitimate interest (Art. 6 para. 1 lit. f GDPR). Our legitimate interest in processing your data is to facilitate easy contact. If you contact us to request a quote, the data is processed for the purpose of carrying out pre-contractual measures (Art. 6 para. 1 lit. b GDPR).
Processing_activities_p12: Recipients of the data may include technical service providers who act as data processors for the operation and maintenance of our website.
Processing_activities_p13: Data will be deleted no later than 90 days after processing your inquiry. If a contractual relationship is established, we are subject to statutory retention periods. These are generally 6 or 10 years for reasons of proper accounting and tax law requirements.
Processing_activities_p14: Providing your personal data is voluntary. However, we can only process your request if you provide us with the necessary data and the reason for your request.
Processing_activities_p15: Please read the information about your right to object under Article 21 GDPR below.
Information_right_object_h2: Information about your right to object pursuant to Article 21 GDPRh
Information_right_object_h3: Right to object on a case-by-case basis
Information_right_object_p1: You have the right to object, on grounds relating to your particular situation, at any time to the processing of personal data concerning you which is based on point (f) of Article 6(1) of the GDPR (processing based on legitimate interests); this also applies to profiling based on those provisions as defined in Article 4(4) of the GDPR. If you object, we will no longer process your personal data unless we can demonstrate compelling legitimate grounds for the processing which override your interests, rights and freedoms, or the processing serves the purpose of establishing, exercising or defending legal claims.
Information_right_object_h2/2: Information about your right to object pursuant to Article 21 GDPR
Changes_privacy_policy_p: We reserve the right to amend this privacy policy to ensure it always complies with current legal requirements or to reflect changes to our services, such as the introduction of new services. The new privacy policy will then apply to your next visit.
Questions_data_protection_p: If you have any questions about data protection, please send us an email to the above-mentioned responsible person.
Copyright_Notices_p: This privacy policy was created with the help of activeMind AG – the experts for
